title: Akame's Katana Murasame
description: This resource pack transforms the Netherite Sword into Murasame, the iconic katana wielded by Akame from Akame ga Kill!
body:
# Murasame – Akame's Katana (Minecraft 3D Texture Pack)

This resource pack transforms the **Netherite Sword** into **Murasame**, the iconic katana wielded by Akame from *Akame ga Kill!*  

The model has been carefully designed to capture the sleek, deadly elegance of Murasame, making your Minecraft combat feel even more intense.



## ⚔️ How to Obtain Murasame
To equip Murasame in-game:  
1. Craft or obtain a **Netherite Sword**.  
2. Rename the sword to **`Murasame`** using an anvil.  
3. Equip it and enjoy your new blade!



## 🔧 Requirements
This texture pack uses **Custom Item Textures (CIT)**.  
To make it work, you’ll need one of the following mods:  

- [OptiFine (Forge)](https://optifine.net/downloads)  
- [CIT Resewn (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)  

Make sure you have one of these installed, otherwise the custom model will not appear.



## 🎨 Features
- **3D Model:** A custom Netherite Sword replacement designed to look like Akame’s Murasame.  
- **Immersion:** Only changes when renamed to `Murasame`, so normal Netherite Swords remain untouched.  
- **Compatibility:** Works alongside most other resource packs that don’t override Netherite Sword CIT.
